query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN research_field IS NOT NULL AND research_field != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_field,
  SUM(CASE WHEN research_field IS NULL OR research_field = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_field
FROM professors;
